import PageExample from '@site/src/components/PageExample';
import { SearchResultsPage } from '@ethds/templates';

<PageExample>
  <SearchResultsPage
    serviceName="Government of Ethiopia"
    languages={[
      { code: 'en', label: 'English' },
      { code: 'am', label: 'አማርኛ' },
    ]}
    locale="en"
    onLocale={() => {}}
    query="passport"
    results={[
      { href: '/passport/new', title: 'Apply for a passport', snippet: 'Get a new Ethiopian passport online.' },
      { href: '/passport/renew', title: 'Renew a passport', snippet: 'Renew an expiring or expired passport.' },
    ]}
    page={1}
    totalPages={1}
    onPage={() => {}}
    footerGroups={[{ title: 'About', links: [{ label: 'Accessibility', href: '/accessibility' }] }]}
    copyright="© 2026 Government of Ethiopia."
  />
</PageExample>

Results for a query — states the result count in plain language, links
each result title to the actual service, and paginates rather than
infinite-scrolling (predictable, low-bandwidth friendly).

```tsx
import { SearchResultsPage } from '@ethds/templates';

<SearchResultsPage
  serviceName="Government of Ethiopia"
  languages={languages}
  locale="en"
  onLocale={(code) => { /* … */ }}
  query="passport"
  onSearch={(query) => { /* re-run the search */ }}
  results={results}
  page={1}
  totalPages={3}
  onPage={(page) => { /* fetch that page */ }}
/>
```

## When to use this template

Use this as the destination of any search box across the system,
including the [National Portal Homepage](national-portal-homepage)'s own
search.

## Accessibility & localization

- One `<h1>`; the result count renders in a `role="status"` live region
  so it's announced without moving focus.
- An empty result set states plainly that there were no matches for the
  query, rather than showing a blank list.
- `query`, every result's `title`/`snippet`, and pagination labels are all
  translated content.

## Plain HTML

A plain `method="get"` search form re-submits the page on every query —
reuses [Search](/docs/components/search#plain-html),
[Alert](/docs/components/alert#plain-html) (empty state), and
[Pagination](/docs/components/pagination#plain-html)'s markup. See the
[template's own HTML Example](https://github.com/yidnekachewkibru/ethgov-design-system/blob/main/packages/ethds-templates/templates/search-results-page.md#html-example)
for the full page.

## Props

| Prop | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|
| `serviceName` | `ReactNode` | Yes |
| `nav` | `HeaderNavItem[]` | No |
| `languages` | `LanguageOption[]` | Yes |
| `locale` | `string` | Yes |
| `onLocale` | `(code: string) => void` | Yes |
| `query` | `string` | Yes |
| `onSearch` | `(query: string) => void` | No |
| `results` | `SearchResult[]` | Yes |
| `page` | `number` | Yes |
| `totalPages` | `number` | Yes |
| `onPage` | `(page: number) => void` | Yes |
| `footerGroups` | `FooterLinkGroup[]` | No |
| `copyright` | `ReactNode` | No |
| `labels` | `Partial<SearchResultsPageLabels>` | No |
